subcodes.first_line: O handmaid of Bahá! Upon thee be glory and upon thee be praise, O thou who remainest of that hallowed and ascended soul [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای امه البهاء علیک البهاء و علیک الثناء یا بقیه تلک النفس القدسیه المتصاعده
subcodes.subjects: @exhortations and counsels, @call to action, @prayer for the spiritual progress of others, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world
